verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm listening to the new song from heaven, I'm wide awake yet dreaming of you, Though I'm not alone, I'm desperate without You, I see your mercy, Lord You are holy, I wanna be more like You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Teach me to live Your love, Help me to give Your love, Show me Your ways, Lord I obey, Your word and live Your love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I stand it all grateful remembrance, I press forth for goal for the price I must win, And I've got my eyes focus upon you, Show me Your beauty as long as your goodness, That makes me more like You.
